sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_id Int32, event_date DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_id;
INSERT INTO test_dates (event_id, event_date) VALUES (1, toDateTime('2023-04-21 10:20:30'));
SELECT event_id, toStartOfMonth(event_date) AS start_of_month FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = toDateTime('2023-05-15 15:30:00') WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, toStartOfMonth(event_date) AS start_of_month FROM test_dates WHERE start_of_month = toStartOfMonth(toDateTime('2023-05-01 12:00:00'));
